name: specky-sdd
description: Specky — The open-source MCP server for Spec-Driven Development (SDD). Transforms natural language into production-grade specifications with EARS notation, architecture design, and quality gates.

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/index.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!'))fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)" && chmod +x dist/index.js

author: Paula Silva <paulasilvatech@github.com> (https://github.com/paulasilvatech)
